systemAdmin.title: ผู้ดูแลระบบ

landing.title: System Admin
landing.lede: Everything behind Carmen — the calendars, permissions, workflows, scripts and datasets that make the rest of the building work. Eleven tools, grouped into five chapters by what they do.

access.title: Who can do what
access.lede: Define the permissions of the building and decide who carries which keys. Roles describe capability; assignments map people onto them.

process.title: How work moves
process.lede: The rules of the road. Define your fiscal calendar, the approval ladders documents must climb, and where every file lives across its life.

observe.title: What's happening
observe.lede: A pair of windows into the building. One looks at the people; the other looks at the machine. Both keep a record long enough to answer hard questions.

config.title: Wiring it together
config.lede: The pieces that connect Carmen to the rest of the world — mailservers, scripts that fire on events, scheduled code that runs without a human.

data.title: Data, ready for use
data.lede: Datasets are the raw material the rest of Carmen reads from. Query them to explore; promote them to a dashboard once they earn it.

roles.name: Roles
roles.long: Bundle granular permissions into named roles — Buyer, Storekeeper, Receiver, Finance Reviewer. Inherit between roles; lock down by module, action, or specific field.

assign.name: Assign Users
assign.one: Map people to roles and properties.
assign.long: Bulk-assign roles to users, scope them to one or many properties, set effective dates for temporary access, and review who has what at a glance.

period.name: Period
period.long: Define fiscal months and quarters, freeze them at close, and reopen with a documented reason. Period status drives what every transaction screen will accept.

workflows.name: Workflows
workflows.one: Approval chains for every document type.
workflows.long: Design who approves what, in which order, with conditions on amount, department, and vendor. Reroute, parallel-approve, escalate on SLA breach — all configurable.

docs.name: Document Management
docs.long: Where attachments live, how long they're kept, who can see them. Set retention by doc type, configure versioning, watermark PDFs and lock originals.

userActivity.name: User Activity
userActivity.long: Full audit log per user — sign-ins, edits, approvals, exports, role changes. Filter by user, date range, action class. Export for SOX, PCI and internal audits.

monitor.name: Activity Monitor
monitor.one: Live system load and job queues.
monitor.long: Watch CPU, memory, request latency, background-job throughput in real time. Drill into any spike, replay the timeline, set alert thresholds per service.

email.name: Email Config
email.long: Hook up your outbound mailserver, manage signing domains, configure DKIM/SPF, edit notification templates per locale. Test-send to any address before going live.

notifyTemplate.name: Notification Templates
notifyTemplate.long: Author the emails and in-app alerts Carmen sends on submit, approve, reject and SLA breach. Edit subject and body per event, drop in tokens, reuse the same template across every workflow.

code.name: Running Code
code.long: Run JavaScript on a cron — nightly data syncs, monthly snapshots, on-event webhooks. Tail logs, replay failures, version-control every script in-place.

query.name: Query Dataset
query.one: SQL workbench over every Carmen table.
query.long: Browse the catalog, run ad-hoc SQL, save queries, share with teammates. Sandboxed read-only by default — promote a query to a saved dataset when it's right.

dataset.name: Dashboard Dataset
dataset.long: Promote a query into a named dataset, schedule refresh, document its columns. Reports and dashboards point here — change a dataset, every chart updates.

footer.title: Read the admin handbook, or jump into a sandbox to try changes safely first.
footer.sub: Every destructive action requires confirmation. Every config change is versioned and reversible.
